What Is the pity of this game?
its odd
its 30

for standard banner (realm study) there's nothing special about it 
for standard wheel banner (aspect of rotation), lose pity (30) twice and you're guaranteed the standard wheel you chose
for limited wheels, the second time you hit pity the wheel is guaranteed
for limited characters, the third time
so overall, you need 90 pulls to guarantee a character and 60 to guarantee a wheel
which is very solid especially considering how you have a high chance to get what you want before hitting hard pity
this game has very solid rates
soft pity 30, soft pity 30, hard pity 90
its 30 but if you're unlucky, 90
and you pull 5'ers

goliath is a good dps, but tulu is just better. 

The thing is, you have a very limited pool of actions (arithmetica), and you usually want your main awaker to be the one that uses most of it (in this case tulu). Every other character is there to amp the main awaker or provide some extra utility, ideally by using the least ammount of arithmetica in the process
Ok so I should swap Goliath for caecus and wait for melting doll

so if you slot in goliath, both him and tulu are competing for resources (tulu wants to use his 4 cost a lot, and goliath wants to use as many cards as possible to generate power).

Caecus on the other hand (with his e2? or was it e3?) provides free heals, plus some shield, plus vulnerability with his exalt.

Sanga is just there to shield and provide another way of generating tentacles

What is a genesis version?
Alt version of existing character
aliemus (moxy) generation, heals a bit, does a TON of damage after her 3rd exalt (ult), and if you get her e1 (portrait 1), she can inflict weakness/vulnerability with one of her cards
exalt (ult) is the main mechanic for a lot of important awakers
Like a skin?

Like new effects on the cards
genesis version of a character, is a whole new character (cards, exalt, skin). In game they belong to an alternate dimension
